allow: Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('/Users/billraymond/Documents/Repos/ai-workshop-starter-web-sveltekit-tailwind/package-lock.json'\); const pkgs = Object.entries\(lock.packages\).filter\(\([k,v]\) => v.os || v.cpu\); pkgs.slice\(0,30\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => console.log\(k, JSON.stringify\({os: v.os, cpu: v.cpu}\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('/Users/billraymond/Documents/Repos/ai-workshop-starter-web-sveltekit-tailwind/package-lock.json'\); const pkgs = Object.entries\(lock.packages\).filter\(\([k,v]\) => v.os || v.cpu\); console.log\('TOTAL PLATFORM-SPECIFIC PACKAGES:', pkgs.length\); const grouped = {}; pkgs.forEach\(\([k,v]\) => { const os = \(v.os || []\).join\(','\) || 'N/A'; grouped[os] = \(grouped[os] || 0\) + 1; }\); console.log\('By OS:'\); Object.entries\(grouped\).forEach\(\([os, count]\) => console.log\('  ' + os + ':', count\)\);")
